prompt: Add a new REST endpoint GET /api/v1/reports/attendance-summary that returns daily attendance counts (present, absent, late, leave) grouped by department for a given date range. The response should be JSON with department name and counts. Put the controller in com.sagar.hr.reporting.
assertions: docs/api/Readme.md has the attendance-summary endpoint listed
docs/changelog/ has an entry for this session
The API doc entry includes method, path, and description
No feature doc was created (this is an addition to existing functionality, not a new feature)
